title: Contract Creation Transaction Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the process and key components involved in creating a new smart contract on a blockchain.
elements: Contract Creation Transaction Data (to: 0x0, data: bytecode)
relationships: User sends a special transaction with no 'to' address and bytecode in the data field
Network miners/validators execute the transaction, which deploys the contract
A new contract account is created and its state is stored on the blockchain
The transaction output provides the address of the newly deployed contract
